description_long: This is a modern, tactical rifle with a sleek, matte black finish and a streamlined, angular design. It features a prominent suppressor attached to the end of the barrel, a detachable curved box magazine, and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The rifle has a bullpup configuration, with the magazine and action located behind the trigger, allowing for a more compact overall length. A full-length Picatinny rail runs along the top, suitable for mounting optics or accessories, and basic iron sights are visible. The foregrip is vertical, providing additional stability during firing, and the stock is integrated into the rear of the weapon, typical of bullpup rifles.
description: A compact, matte black bullpup rifle with a suppressor, vertical foregrip, and detachable curved magazine. It features a full-length top rail and integrated iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suppressor, vertical foregrip, and narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, curved magazine, pistol grip, and integrated stock.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the compact bullpup design and the back of the stock.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, suppressor, and ergonomic grip details.
